_comment_trees: Stylized Provencal trees by default. Replace with Megascans paths from Content/Environments/ if desired.
_comment_rocks: Stylized Provencal forest/small rocks. Leave empty to skip rocks branch.
_comment_height: Optional: set height_filter_min and height_filter_max (world Z in cm) to spawn only on terrain. E.g. -5000 to 5000. Leave null to skip.
_comment_offset: Z offset in cm (negative=down) so center-pivot meshes sit on surface.
